docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF EUGENE JOSEPH BARRIOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMBASSADOR RITZ FOUR PERCENT, L.P. IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARRIOS, EUGENE JOSEPH ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,014.00 FILED BY BARRIOS, EUGENE JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT AMBASSADOR RITZ FOUR PERCENT, L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ELFISA REESE & GREGORY MORSE FILED BY DEFENDANT AMBASSADOR RITZ FOUR PERCENT, L.P.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2026 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-05-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMBASSADOR RITZ FOUR PERCENT, L.P.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARRIOS, EUGENE JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMBASSADOR RITZ FOUR PERCENT, L.P. $1,014.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,014.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
